mdx: select {[Measures].[Unit Sales]} on columns from Sales

sqlExecutions.sql: select "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c0", sum("sales_fact_1997"."unit_sales") as "m0" from "sales_fact_1997" as "sales_fact_1997", "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where "time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "sales_fact_1997"."time_id" = "time_by_day"."time_id" group by "time_by_day"."the_year"
